title: Biden stops campaign bleeding - but more tough days could be ahead
shortDescription: President Biden's disastrous debate has likely assured heightened scrutiny over his mental fitness through the election.

title: Biden pledges defense equipment for Ukraine, says Putin will be stopped
shortDescription: In 2020, the year he was elected, Biden said only nine NATO allies were spending 2% of their GDP on defense. This year, 23 will spend at least 2%.

title: Biden celebrates 75th anniversary of NATO
shortDescription: President Joe Biden, on the 75th anniversary of NATO, spoke about the progress the coalition of 32 nations have made during his tenure as president.

title: OnPolitics: Biden walking tightrope after disastrous debate
shortDescription: Joe Biden is walking a tightrope after a disastrous debate performance that raised new concerns among voters about whether he can defeat Donald Trump.

title: Jill Biden emerges as the president's biggest cheerleader
shortDescription: Never mind her husband’s debate performance, the first lady has kept a busy schedule crisscrossing the country making the case for her husband.

title: Democrats share opinions on Biden's status
shortDescription: Congressional Democrats shared their opinions on Joe Biden's status as the presidential nominee prior to a closed door meeting.

title: Baseless claim Biden had emergency on Air Force One | Fact check
shortDescription: A journalist traveling with President Joe Biden reported no signs of an emergency, and Biden was filmed walking off the plane alone.

title: Biden will serve full second term if he's reelected, White House says
shortDescription: President Joe Biden commits to serving his full second term if reelected, which would make him 86 years old when he leaves office, the White House said.

title: Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen questioned by Congress on President Biden's mental state
shortDescription: Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen was questioned by Republican representative Mike Lawler of New York over President Biden's mental state.

title: Nikki Haley to release delegates ahead of RNC to vote for Donald Trump
shortDescription: The former Republican rival released her 97 delegates ahead of the RNC, urging them to vote for Trump.

title: 'Not going to fly': Antiabortion activists rattle Trump ahead of RNC
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump's party could be crashed by angry evangelicals, who are questioning the GOP's commitment to the anti-abortion movement.

title: Could the Supreme Court block Biden's SAVE student loan plan?
shortDescription: Republican attorneys general argue President Biden's latest student debt relief plan is as unlawful as the one the Supreme Court struck down last year.

title: Court allows White House to resume plan lowering monthly student loan payments
shortDescription: The Biden administration can begin cutting student loan payments by half for millions of borrowers in July, an appeals court ruled.

title: Biden's executive order changes green card process | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden's order will allow about half a million spouses and children of U.S. citizens to apply for permanent residency without leaving the country.

title: Trump-appointed judge resigns after misconduct report findings
shortDescription: US Judge Joshua Kindred, appointed by Donald Trump, resigned in a letter to Joe Biden after a misconduct report showed his relationship with a clerk.

title: Biden gains momentum but Democrats' concerns haven't vanished
shortDescription: Biden's 2024 status got prime-time billing during Democratic huddles following growing concern over whether the party has a path forward for November.

title: Sen. Sherrod Brown mum on Biden as Democrats debate presidential race
shortDescription: During a stop in Youngstown, Sen. Sherrod Brown declined to say whether he thinks President Joe Biden should stay in the race.

title: Virginia Sen. Warner backs off secret meeting, still skeptical of Biden
shortDescription: The senior senator from Virginia reportedly tried to organize a meeting with Democratic lawmakers about Biden’s fate on the presidential ticket.

title: Jon Stewart wants Democrats to consider other candidates in 2024 race
shortDescription: "The Daily Show" host Jon Stewart criticized Democrats for sticking with President Joe Biden without considering other candidates in the 2024 race.

title: Biden hosts high-stakes NATO summit in Washington | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: A Republican committee signs off on a Donald Trump RNC platform - including abortion. | Study finds a clear winner between Mounjaro and Ozempic.

title: Older Americans are often caregivers. And they vote.
shortDescription: Voters over 50 want a President who will pay attention to caregivers like themselves.

title: Rep. Jerry Nadler backs Biden, says concerns are 'besides the point'
shortDescription: Rep. Jerry Nadler, the top Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee, reversed his previous stance that President Biden should step aside for 2024.

title: Lara Trump says Republicans are united, Democrats are in 'disarray'
shortDescription: Republican National Committee Co-chair Lara Trump says the GOP is united ahead of the Republican National Convention next week.

title: Squad backing: AOC says she's spoken with Joe Biden and supports him
shortDescription: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, D-N.Y., told reporters Monday that she supports President Joe Biden’s decision to stay in the 2024 race.
